link.label: Global Chat Link
link.desc: Link a channel to cross-server chat
unlink.label: Global Chat Unlink
config.link_hint: Servers link a channel via {cmd} on Discord (requires the "{perm}" permission). Messages in a linked channel are relayed to all other linked channels of this bot. Anyone mentioned in the text with {mention} additionally receives a DM (real Discord mentions don't ping across servers).
config.no_links: No server has linked a channel yet.
config.confirm_unlink: Really remove the link for guild {guild}?
